scripts.build:legacy: pnpm run assets:check && node tools/build-production.mjs --profile legacy
scripts.build:legacy-dev: pnpm run assets:check && node tools/build-production.mjs --profile legacy-dev
scripts.build:standard: pnpm run assets:check && node tools/build-production.mjs --profile standard
scripts.test: node --test tests/*.test.mjs && node tools/validate-voice-npc.mjs && node tools/validate-prism-minigame.mjs && node tools/validate-perspective-minigame.mjs
